description: The puma Grit backpack is an effort to carry your load using nature-friendly material. Complete with spacious chambers and an ergonomically fitted backstrap, this bag is well suited for both short trips and corporate use. Length: 31 cm Made of 73% polyester, 13% nylon and 9% 14 oz. cotton for absolute durability, environment friendly purposes and easy cleaning Two main chambers with the second chamber opening up to a sub-chamber Two zipper pockets on the front chamber Branded zippers with suede pullers Mesh lining at the back with leisurely padded back straps Adjustable back straps for a customised Fit Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
